title: Soundtrack player
description: An in-game soundtrack player that lets you play, pause, and control all 50+ Minecraft background music tracks. Features true pause/resume, volume control, track navigation, and a clean GUI. Press M to open!
body:
# Soundtrack Player

Adds a proper music player to Minecraft. Playlists, shuffle, custom tracks.

- **Playlists** — create, name, add/remove tracks via right-click
- **Shuffle** — cycles through everything before repeating, no duplicates
- **Loop modes** — off, loop all, loop one
- **Skip/previous** — previous button restarts the current track if you're past 3 seconds
- **Volume slider** — completely separate from game sounds, saved between sessions
- **Custom tracks** — drop MP3/OGG/WAV/FLAC into the custom folder and they show up automatically
- **Full player screen** — searchable track list and playlist manager, open with M
- **Pause menu widget** — mini player with seek bar, four corner positions, adjustable opacity
- **In-game HUD** — small overlay showing track and progress, disappears when you open any menu
- **Keybinds** — play/pause, skip, volume, shuffle, loop, all rebindable
- **Auto-resume** — remembers where you were when you closed the game
- **Client-side only** — works on any server, no mods required on their end

---

The mod works well but it's not perfect — there's probably bugs in there. If something breaks or behaves weirdly, report it in the Discord and I'll take a look. You can also grab the soundtrack manually from there if the first launch download fails.

**Discord:** https://discord.gg/4t3K5HnfB6
